_comment: A1 dependency-bump automation (epic #5359, milestone 0.1.4). General Go-module freshness PLUS grammar-ready: the per-language grammar modules land here once B2 (#5418) migrates off the single smacker binding. NOTE: the current grammar binding (smacker/go-tree-sitter) is unmaintained and pinned at its own upstream HEAD, so Renovate finds nothing newer on it today — A2 (#5411, per-grammar cron) is the real grammar alarm. See docs/grammar-freshness-audit.md.
schedule: before 6am on the first day of the month

packageRules.description: Group routine Go module updates into one PR to limit noise.

Grammar dep (and future per-language grammar modules) get their own labeled PR so a bump routes to the B1 benchmark gate, NEVER to auto-merge. The smacker binding is unmaintained today; this primes A1 for the day it revives or B2 (#5418) splits grammars into per-language modules.
